_meta.purpose: PROOF SAMPLE for docs/CATALOG.md Stage A (real note pyramids). Five iconic catalog entries, real note data sourced from general knowledge of the mainline formulations. NOT merged into /fragrances - this is a review artifact per CATALOG.md rule 5. Joseph validates accuracy + format here BEFORE the full top-100 batch is built.
_meta.verify_before_merge: Every entry must be spot-checked against the brand's or a major retailer's product page. Note pyramids can differ by concentration (e.g. Sauvage EDT vs EDP vs Parfum) - confirm the concentration each catalog id actually carries.
_meta.note_on_duplicate_ids: Several of these products appear in the catalog under multiple gender/vibe/tier ids (Sauvage has ~7). Notes are per-PRODUCT, so in the real batch one verified pyramid propagates to every id variant of that product.

entries.name: Sauvage
entries.description: A bright, radiant opening of bergamot gives way to a peppery, aromatic heart and a warm, mineral trail of ambroxan and cedar. Clean and forceful, it reads modern and effortless in equal measure.

entries.name: Creed Aventus
entries.description: A fruity, smoky signature built on juicy pineapple and blackcurrant over a dry, birch-smoke base. Bold and polished, it wears like confidence in a bottle.

entries.name: Black Opium
entries.description: A jolt of black coffee wrapped in sweet vanilla and white flowers. Addictive and nocturnal, it leans into warmth without tipping into cloying.

entries.name: Light Blue
entries.description: Crisp Sicilian lemon and green apple over a soft cedar base. A sun-on-skin summer staple, breezy and instantly likeable.

entries.name: La Vie Est Belle
entries.description: A sweet gourmand centered on praline and iris, softened by tonka and vanilla. Rich but rounded, it stays comforting rather than heavy.
